title: Oeosporangium delicatulum

It belongs to the genus Oeosporangium, which is a group of fungi that are typically epiphytic or saxicolous. The classification of Oeosporangium delicatulum is as follows: kingdom Fungi, phylum Ascomycota, class Lecanoromycetes, order Peltigerales, family Gymnophilaceae.
